items.text:
CASTING CALL!! HENRY'S GHOST - A COVID-19 STORY
# A lonely widower, driven by the aftermath of COVID-19 isolation, attempts to prove to his son the presence of a spirit haunting his flat, whom he quietly believes to be his wife.

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

From Director ***Jacob James Ward*** with previous works such as *'Fallowfield' *and *'he lives here'* which are currently on the festival circuit, comes a film experience with foundations deep within the essential worker communities affected by COVID-19. 

CASTING FOR
# ***HENRY STONE ***
## ***45 - 55 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Henry, a veteran bus driver struggling with survivors guilt, lives as a stoic, working class representation of the mismanagement of the COVID era in the UK. While working as a bus driver at the height of COVID, Henry slowly saw the toll the pandemic had on his social infrastructure - losing friends, and eventually, his wife.  Now, years later with little attempt to process his tragic loss, he makes an attempt to fill the void created by his loneliness by slowly falling down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories and is disillusioned by the prospect of a ghost living in his flat who he believes to be his late wife. In a desperate attempt, he tries to convince it's existence to his son. 

# ***JAMES STONE ***
## ***20 - 25 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Despite living a life surviving it all, Henry can now only be saved by his lone son - James.

James, burdened by the pressures of university, his job and his father's declining mental state, represents the loss of youth and importance of growing responsibility brought on by COVID for young people. James sorely wants to reconnect with his father and help them both move on from the death of James' mother. James must convince his father to stop looking for the dead and start talking to the living - which is easier said than done. 

# *EXTRAS WANTED!!*
## ***20 - 60 YEARS OLD ***
## ***ANY GENDER ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

We are seeking extras to portray Henry's co-workers in a key sequence that explores and visualises his grief and survivor's guilt. 

If you're interested in being part of this important scene and enhancing the world that we are building, please get in touch!!

***CREW:***

DIRECTOR - JJ Ward 

PRODUCER - George Grant 

CINEMATOGRAPHER - Jack Gaskell 

EDITOR - Matthew Wadham 

SOUND DESIGNER - Jacob Kelly 

Our entire crew has a powerful personal connection to COVID, with myself (the Director) having been locked down during my formative years between GCSEs and A-LEVELs. Many more of you out there will have your own Covid story and we'd love to hear from you!

If this sounds like something you'd be interested working on, with an experienced crew looking to take this to film festivals and beyond, then please get in touch! We'll be sending over script segments and asking for self tapes at this time, with studio auditions to come later :) 

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

SPEAK SOON!

CONTACTS:
* Message me on this account :)
* Email the director: jacobward044@gmail.com
* Email the producer: georgefgrant@icloud.com

items.text:
🎬 **SEEKING SFX MAKEUP / PRACTICAL FX ARTIST — FEATURE FILM (GEORGIA)**

**LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**

**Genre:** Indie Horror / Psychological Thriller

**Status:** NON-SAG / NON-UNION FEATURE

📍 **Location:** North Georgia (Blue Ridge / Atlanta area)

📆 **Shoot Duration:** 18 days (April 2026)

🏠 **Lodging & Meals Provided During Filming**

🎥 **Small, focused, professional indie crew**

**🔥 PROJECT OVERVIEW**

We are seeking **one highly skilled SFX Makeup / Practical FX Artist** (or a very small team) with a strong creative eye and a **story-driven approach to practical effects**.

This is a **passion-driven independent feature film**, created by filmmakers investing their own resources to bring a dark, atmospheric story to life. We’re looking for a collaborator who enjoys shaping horror elements through **practical makeup, prosthetics, and blood effects**, while working closely with the director.

**🩸 SFX / MAKEUP SCOPE (PRACTICAL)**

**Note:** All **gunshots and impacts will be created in post-production (VFX)**.

The SFX Makeup Artist will be responsible for **aftermath effects only** (wounds, blood, prosthetics).

• Demonic baby doll face (practical)

• Mary’s face “eaten” by baby (prosthetic / FX)

• Tom — stab wound (hand)

• Tom — knife cut to neck

• Mary repeatedly stabbing Tom during climax (practical blood & wounds)

• **Aftermath of gunshot wounds** (blood, entry/exit wounds, body effects)

• Owl Totem Mask (practical prop / mask)

• Creature / Entity: **Tatakala** (prosthetic / creature design)

• General character makeup for cast

**💰 COMPENSATION**

**Flat Rate:** **$3,000 total (Labor)**
Production will cover all approved materials and fabrication costs separately.

(Estimated 18 days of work including prep + shoot days)

*This is a micro-budget independent production. Lodging and meals are provided during filming.*

**🎭 ROLE REQUIRED**

• **Special Effects / Makeup (SFX) Artist**

**📩 TO APPLY**

Please send:

• Portfolio or reel of SFX / prosthetic work

• Brief note on experience with blood FX and prosthetic makeup

• Location & availability in April 2026

**Email:** david@313-films.com

**Project:** *Lake of the Brokenhearted*

**Director / Producer:** David Jaure

**Production**: 13 Films 

🎥 **Director Demo Reel (Narrative Film Work):**

🎬 **CASTING CALL — FEATURE FILM (GEORGIA)**

**LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**

**Filming:** April 2026

**Location:** North Georgia (Lake / Forest / Cabins)

**Format:** Independent Feature Film

**Status:** PAID — **$150 per filming day**

We are now casting **select roles** for our independent feature film **LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**, a character-driven psychological thriller with supernatural elements.

We’re seeking **strong, grounded actors** with natural, emotionally honest performances.

**🎭 **
**AVAILABLE ROLES & FILMING DAYS**

• **TATAKALA** — Female, 30s+ (Physical / Creature Role)

  **Filming:** 2 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **ROBERT** — Male, ~10 (Native Kid)

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NATIVE MAN (Gas Station)** — Male, 50s–60s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NATIVE GIRL (Gas Station)** — Female, ~5 years old

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **HANDSOME CLIENT** — Male, 40s

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **CHUBBY CLIENT** — Male, 40s

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NURSE** — Female, 40s–50s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **SECURITY** — Male, 30s–50s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

**📩 **
**HOW TO SUBMIT**

Please email submissions to:

**📧 david@313-films.com**

Include:

1. Name & Age
2. Current Location (Georgia locals preferred)
3. Headshot + Demo Reel (or self-tape / scene link)
4. Availability in **April 2026**

📌 **IMPORTANT NOTES**

• This is a **NON-SAG independent feature film**

• No lodging or travel provided

• Small, professional crew

• Character breakdowns & audition sides provided upon request

**Director / Producer:** David Jaure

**Production:** 3:13 Films

🎥 **Director Demo Reel (Narrative Film Work):**

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cxxUbmH05FU

items.text:
TV 2 søger mennesker på mellem 20-40 år, som er klar til at udforske intimitet, nærhed og sig selv.  

På et 2-ugers retreat i Sydeuropa i smukke og trygge omgivelser bliver du en del af et fællesskab med andre mennesker i samme situation. Her bliver du støttet og guidet af et team af landets bedste sexologer og terapeuter.  

Det er hverken dating eller en konkurrence. Det handler ikke om at præstere, men om at lære dig selv bedre at kende - i dit eget tempo og med respekt for dine grænser.  

Hvem ved - måske tager du hjem med en større ro, mere mod og en ny tro på, at nærhed og relationer også kan være noget for dig. 

Måske er det ikke dig, men en du kender, der kunne have glæde af et luksuriøst retreat og et trygt fællesskab.  

Vil du helt uforpligtende høre mere, og har du nogle spørgsmål, så skriv på denne mail:
cast@nordiskfilmtv.com eller læs mere om tv-programmet og ansøg via dette link: https://shortaudition.com/TV2program

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, television and text that says 'TV 2 soger medvirkende til nyt TV-program Er du jomfru? Er du nervos for, om du nogensinde fảr en kaereste? Eller har du det (ligesom mange andre!) bare svaert ved intimitet? Sảe du ikke alene TV soger modige danskere til e varmt TV-program om voksne mennesker, som er klar il at udforsk intimitet, naerhed og sig selv.'

items.text:
**STATISTER SØGES - LØNNET**

Pænt goddag! 

GotFat mangler 5 friske statister (3 mænd og 2 kvinder i alderen 25-35 år) til en ny kampagnefilm for Mediehusene i Silkeborg!

Vi skal filme en hyggelig morgen ved bålet d. 8. april, og da det er en hurtig opgave (kl. 06:15 - 07:30) kan du sagtens nå resten af dagens gøremål efterfølgende 🙌🏼

* **Honorar:** 500 kr. i B-honorar pr. person.
* **Kontakt:** Send navn og billede til **lassepablo@gotfat.dk**

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

Honorar: Der gives statist. tB honorar pà 500 Interesserot? lassepablo@gotfat.dk hurtigst muligt. Vì glooder os here ira er!'

items.text:
**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of bed, bedroom and text

topComments.text: I would so love to audition for this… dang… did you know SAG has a specific signatory available for student films? It’s very accessible and will allow you to include SAG actors in your projects.
I don't see a link as well!@ i would love to audition

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | $100 Stipend | Student Film | Downtown Denver**

**Title:** *Manic/Depressive*

**Genre:** Psychological Drama

**Logline:** After being discharged from a psych ward, a charismatic but fragile young woman (Camila) invites a fellow patient (Lena) to crash on her couch. What begins as a manic whirlwind quickly spirals into a toxic power struggle that threatens Camila's stability and safety.

**TW: **Involves drug use, light intimacy (kissing & implied, off-screen intercourse) & domestic abuse. Intimacy and physical altercations (a shove, slap and spit) are scripted. A clear protocol will be established during rehearsals to ensure talent safety and comfort.

*Audition information listed below character descriptions.*

**Character Descriptions:**

**Lead: ****Camila **(Female Presenting - Latina/Hispanic- 18-27):

A bipolar-1 woman freshly out of a psychiatric hospital who clings to Lena due to psychosis, insecurity and infatuation. Camila isn’t the greatest judge of character and is easily enthralled by big personalities. She needs to get better, but she wants validation and comfort much more. We see Camila in a manic and depressed state in the film so her character needs to show the full range of the bipolar spectrum. When she’s manic, she’s upbeat, enthusiastic, affable and passionate. When she’s depressed, she’s a barely verbal husk of her former self, completely numb, drained and emotionally destitute. Some Spanish speaking experience is preferred but not required. Must be comfortable with intimacy (kissing) and portraying heavy emotional shifts. We are looking for an actress who can play 'the light' and 'the dark' with equal authenticity.

**Co-Lead: Lena **(Female Presenting - Race Unspecified - 18-27):

An unstable, unhoused young woman in active addiction. Self-centered, calculated and charismatic, she initially just takes advantage of Camila’s kindness. However, when forced up against a wall, she resorts to using Camila’s attraction to her to her advantage so that she can continue to stay in the apartment. Lena’s “relationship” with Camila is part manipulation, part genuine attraction. Lena needs to feel good as much as she needs to survive. Must be comfortable with intimacy (kissing) and portraying rapid emotional shifts. Requires an actress capable of 'flipping a switch.' Lena is charming and vulnerable one moment , and cold or volatile the next. Character has scenes involving drug use and physical confrontation (slapping/spitting). Tattoos, died hair and/or piercings are preferred but not required.

**Supporting: Dante **(Male Presenting - Race Unspecified - 18-27):

A grounded, self-assured and kind young man who is Camila’s roommate. The stable ‘anchor’ of the film. He’s been living with Camila for quite a while and as a result, loves and knows her deeply. He's familiar with her pathologies and is well-versed with unstable people. Immediately wary of Lena, he tries his best to help Camila see the light (although he isn’t successful until it’s too late). To some extent, Dante is the audience's eyes. We need a grounded actor who can convey deep history with minimal dialogue and concern for Camila without appearing judgmental. He is the calm at the center of their storm.

**Contact Information:** Text 720.498.1561 (preferred) or email maxjordan.motionpictures@gmail.com to receive sides for self-tapes.

**Audition Information:** Submit self-tapes by 2/28 using the above email (Both provided scenes required for Camila & Lena, only 1 required for Dante) - framing is up to actor discretion. Callbacks will be conducted in-person (and on zoom if necessary) during the 1st week of March.

**Directed by:** Mia Baca

**Production Type:** Student Short Film for CU Denver

**Run Time:** 7.5 Minutes

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Filming Location:** Downtown Denver, CO

**Shooting Schedule:** 2-3 Rehearsals in Late March/Early April, 4-6 shoot dates in Mid-Late April (Not yet locked as they will be built around cast & crew’s schedules)

**Compensation:** Guaranteed $100 minimum stipend for all on-screen roles + access to footage for reels.

items.text:
**Title:** Rooms

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A woman spends a lonely night in a hotel room and seeks connection

**Roles:**

**Woman:** (Early to mid 20s) – Transfemale, any ethnicity. Must be

comfortable with nudity

She is a shy and anxious person. She wants to be seen and

perceived but as who she wants to be and not who she is. She is

the protagonist.

**Brian:** (Mid to late 20s) – Male, any ethnicity.

Brian is a standard “guy” he’s a bit on the nerdy side but not

to the point that anyone would call him that. He likes Marvel

movies and sports and holds both in equal stature. He likes

being with Elaine because she’s demonstrably cooler than him.

**Elaine:** (Mid to late 20s) – Female, any ethnicity.

Elaine is a bit cooler than Brian. She doesn’t find him

intellectually stimulating but he’s good for a laugh. She finds

satisfaction in art and mixing that with psychedelia. She could

be reasonably described as “beatnik”

**Cole:** (30-40s) – Male, any ethnicity.

He is a struggling middle manager who’s trying to get a leg up.

(Kind of going through is own internal Death of a Salesman).

**Director:** Eileen Tierney

**Production Type:** Student Short Film

**Contact Information:** rooms.shortfilm@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short

**Compensation:** Unpaid

**Non-Union**

**Audition Date:** Saturday, February 21st, 2026. 11am - 7pm

**Audition Location:** UCCS Campus - El Pomar Center 103 (directions will be sent by email)

**Shooting Schedule:** Sunday, March 8th, 2026 (Rehearsal times are decided after casting has completed)

**Filming Location: **7265 Commerce Center, Colorado Springs, CO

**Project Description:** A woman navigates loneliness in a hotel

🎬 Zapraszam do współpracy! 🎬
RAFAŁ GRZYB – www.grzybnaplanie.com !

Jeżeli szukasz kreatywnego aktora, który potrafi wcielić się w różnorodne role, oddać prawdziwe emocje i wnieść na plan pozytywną energię, to dobrze trafiłeś! 🤩 Uwielbiam pracę na planie, swobodnie czuję się przed kamerą i chętnie podejmuję nowe wyzwania.

Sukcesywnie biorę udział w realizacjach do seriali telewizyjnych, m.in. „Detektywi”, „Gliniarze”, "Policjanci w akcji", „Sprawiedliwi. Trójmiasto”, w filmach m.in. „Dziki, Dziki Wschód”, „Bez powrotu”, reklamach oraz brałem udział w rozmowie na żywo w studiu DDTVN. 🎥

Skontaktuj się ze mną:
📞 604 478 542
📩 ir.grzyb@gmail.com
🌐 www.grzybnaplanie.com

WARSZAWA / WROCŁAW

18 i 20.02 - kontynuacja

300zł / dzień 💵

Gramy kolumbijskie więzienie! Szukam statystów MĘŻCZYZN do roli WIĘŹNIÓW -  polaków o urodzie latynoskiej 

* ciemniejsza karnacja, bruneci, z zarostem lub bez, mile widziane tatuaże, w wieku 18+

Zdjęcia we Wrocławiu - zapewniamy zwrot kosztów dojazdu oraz nocleg!

Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na adres: patrycja@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: WIĘZIENIE

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość oraz ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI tylko z dnia zgłoszenia

Casting call
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “WORK FRIENDS” (London)

We are casting for a dark comedy short film set in a corporate office environment.

Student production with festival submission plans.

📍 London (office interior)

🗓 2 shooting days – last weeks of March

🎥 Festival-focused short film

ROLES:

• C (F, 20s–early 30s) – Lead. Anxious, intelligent office worker. Strong subtle acting + physical comedy timing required.

• B (F, 20s–30s) – Work friend. Natural, warm, slightly awkward. Good comedic timing.

• D (M, 20s–30s) – Quiet office colleague. Deadpan presence.

• Boss (M, 40s–50s) – Corporate authority figure. Small but impactful role.

Unpaid student project.

Food provided. London travel expenses covered.

Film intended for festival circuit and showreels.

📩 Please send headshots + showreel (if available) to casting.annet@gmail.com

items.text:
Kids Talent Agency
I signed up for this company the other day after asking google to recommend good agency’s. I didn’t expect to actually hear anything back from these people but my mum had an email saying they would like me to register fully. Has anybody ever been with this agency if so are they good? I wanna be an actor in the future in west end.

topComments.text:
Hi Emma. Please get a parent to join Children's Acting, Modelling, Casting Calls & FREE Advice for Parents UK which has lots of advice and a list of reputable recommended agencies... Do not accept any offer until you do so... Can you precisely name the agency or provide their link please as there are lots with similar names some of which are scams, some legitimate but not recommended, and some reputable and recommended (there is a list of the latter category in featured posts in the above group)...
Age 14 is pretty much the worst time to start out unfortunately and trying to find a reputable agent will be more difficult.... You may be better waiting until straight after you finish GCSES... This is because after GCSEs there is no need for a child performance licence and young to mid teens are therefore played by over 16s and sometimes over 18s as no need for a chaperone... Agencies books will already be full of existing kids who have been doing it for years, many with credits, and there are very limited opportunities. None for MT.  Even if you find a reputable agency chances are dlim and you will need to budget £300 or more per year on Spotlight fees and headshot costs alone. Probably much more. 
In terms of this group please can you get a parent to join on your behalf for your own safety?
Be really careful I’ve fallen into a few traps. I wish you all the best and I hope you find genuine people who want to support you.

items.text:
🇨🇦 Wait... I actually beat Celine Dion in the charts this week? 🤯
Hi everyone! 🎬

​I just had to share this because it feels surreal. I’m a trilingual actor based in Europe, and for the last 12 days, my career feature has been sitting in the Top 5 most-read articles in Montreal (Le Petit Journal), ranking right next to global icons like Celine Dion and Mika.

​I’ve just updated my IMDb with the new reels and the story behind this madness.

​Curious to see the profile? Check it out here: 👉 https://m.imdb.com/fr/name/nm17275527/

​Drop your link below! I’m on a clicking spree today—let’s boost each other’s rankings and show some support. Can’t wait to see your work! 🚀✨

​#IMDb #ActingCommunity #Trending #ActorLife #SupportEachOther #Filmmakers

Rose Waite Studio is looking for individuals, friends, colleagues and families (18+) with varying attitudes towards football — from die-hard to indifferent — for a World Cup promotional campaign.

Whether you’re already planning your sweepstakes or you might tolerate the odd match, we’d love to hear from you. We want to capture the general public from all walks of life and approaches to football.

Talent must be comfortable on set as well as self-shooting.

Filming / Self Shooting Period: 16 March - 10 April

UK-based talent. Paid opportunity. No previous experience needed to apply.

To apply, please email stories@rosewaite.com with the subject ‘World Cup Campaign’.

Please include:
Name / Age / Profession / Location / Selfie
Your Attitude Towards Football
The team(s) you support (if any)
Instagram handle (if you have account)

🌸✨ III MIĘDZYNARODOWY ONLINE KONKURS SZTUKI
„WIOSENNE TALENTY” ✨🌸

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń: 21.02 – 07.03
💻 Uczestnictwo zdalne (online)

Wiosna to czas odrodzenia, energii i nowych możliwości 🌷🌿
To właśnie teraz warto pokazać światu swój talent i rozkwitnąć razem z naturą! 🌼🎨🎶

Zapraszamy do udziału w wyjątkowym wydarzeniu artystycznym, które łączy twórców z różnych krajów 🌍

👩‍🎤👨‍🎨 Bez ograniczeń wiekowych!
🎭 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki – każdy znajdzie przestrzeń dla swojej pasji!

🏅 Medale i puchary.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.text:
WROCŁAW // NA RATUNEK 112
PILNE

Do serialu "Na Ratunek 112" nadal poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

27.02 (PIĄTEK) - 28.02 (SOBOTA)

Damian Banaszyk (18 - 21 lat; z wyglądu 17 lat) - Uczeń liceum, wrażliwy i odpowiedzialny nastolatek. Po pierwszym zbliżeniu z Karoliną musi zmierzyć się z informacją o ciąży. Początkowo jest przerażony i bezradny, zwierza się rodzicom. Po rozstaniu z Karoliną układa sobie życie z nową dziewczyną, ale wciąż czuje odpowiedzialność za byłą dziewczynę. Gdy odkrywa, że Karolina faktycznie jest w ciąży, pomaga jej podczas przedwczesnego porodu.

27.02 (PIĄTEK) - 28.02 (SOBOTA)

Bogdan Banaszyk (42 - 49 lat) - JUŻ OBSADZONE.

27.02 (PIĄTEK) - 28.02 (SOBOTA)

Ewelina Adamiak (16 - 20 lat) - Nowa dziewczyna Damiana, bardzo ładna ale próżna. Jest zazdrosna o Karolinę.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla roli DAMIANA zapewniamy również nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie AKTUALNEGO zdjęcia oraz wideo wizytówki (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby) na WhatsApp na numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Do wystąpienia osób poniżej 18 roku życia potrzebujemy zgody OBOJGA rodziców.

Wiadomości od chętnych odczytuję codziennie w okolicach 18:00 - 19:00.

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

items.title: Casting Call

items.text:
**Вакансія:**

** Швачка / кравець для танцювальної команди.**

📍 *Туреччина, м. Бодрум*

Запрошуємо до співпраці **професійну швачку / кравця** для пошиття та обслуговування сценічних костюмів.

**Обов’язки:**
* Пошиття сценічних і танцювальних костюмів
* Підгонка костюмів
* Ремонт та коригування костюмів
* Участь у розробці та реалізації дизайнерських рішень

**Вимоги:**
* Досвід роботи у сфері пошиття одягу (досвід зі сценічними костюмами є перевагою)
* Професійне володіння швейним обладнанням
* Акуратність, відповідальність, пунктуальність
* Уміння працювати у стислі терміни

**Умови:**
* Робота у м. Бодрум, Туреччина
* Формат співпраці: проєктна / часткова / повна зайнятість — за домовленістю
* Оплата праці обговорюється індивідуально, залежно від кваліфікації та обсягу робіт

📩 Для відгуку на вакансію просимо надсилати коротке резюме та портфоліо за номером +380736327966 (Telegram, WhatsApp)

Schauspieler gesucht!

Wir drehen am Samstag, 07.03., einen kleinen Film für ein Personal-Fitnessstudio in Berlin.

Der Film startet mit kurzen Vignetten über toxische Trainertypen: ein testosterongeladener No-Pain-no-Gain-Bodybuilder, eine gewaltbereite Boxtrainerin und ein möchtegern-erleuchteter, übergriffiger Yogalehrer. Für die letzte Rolle suchen wie aktuell noch eine männliche Person, 30 - 60Jahre aus Berlin.

Das Budget ist leider klein, daher können wir nur eine Aufwandsentschädigung von 250 Euro anbieten. 

Der Dreh dieser kurzen Szene dauert max 2h. 

Catering und gute Laune vorhanden.

Weitere Infos gerne eine Email an

lauralooksformore@gmail.com

LG Laura

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of jewelry and text that says '03. YOGALEHRER ኢድችዮ Mala Kette Transparente Brille Man Bun mit Feder Stirnband Leinen Hemd weiss •Aladin Hose Barfuss Schuhe •Ayahuasca Armbänder ● Vulva Ohrring (nur eine Seite) gettyimages Credit: bojanstory'

items.text:
Hallo zusammen!

Eine britische Castingagentur (Trilogy Casting) sucht aktuell für eine neue Lifestyle-Serie eines großen Fernsehsenders Menschen, die sich von Unordnung überfordert fühlen. Wir dachten, diese Gruppe wäre der richtige Ort, um diese Information zu teilen.

Fällt es Ihnen schwer, für etwas Wichtiges zu sparen – wie eine Hochzeit, Flitterwochen, eine Hausrenovierung oder ein anderes großes Ziel? Experten helfen Ihnen gerne. Die Teilnahme wird finanziell vergütet.

Bitte beachten Sie, dass Sie als britische Produktionsfirma grundlegende Englischkenntnisse für die Kommunikation mit dem Casting-Team benötigen.

Lesen Sie bitte den Flyer unten.

Vielen Dank!

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m officially open to taking on new roles for 2026 🎬
About me - I’m returning as a guest star in Netflix’s 'Geek Girl' season two, and I have upcoming lead roles in four features (Apple TV and Prime). Previous credits include a lead in double BAFTA nominated Netflix show 'A Whole Lifetime', guest starring in 'Ted Lasso', and leads in several award-winning shorts. 

I also work with the United Nations as an ambassador for human rights in the film industry and recently shot the cover of Vogue (fun fact!☺️)

I’m able to work in multiple countries, originating from the UK and currently residing in LA. Pleased message for reels if interested!

# **URGENT TALENT CALL FOR FEBRUARY 23RD – FBI AGENTS – VERNON, CA**

We are urgently casting **2 male talent** to portray FBI agents for a Streamer's Promo Video on **February 23, 2026**.

We’re looking for talent with a **lanky, fit build** — overall the classic, stereotypical FBI agent look. Clean-cut, professional presence, and comfortable portraying authority on camera.

**📍Location:** Vernon, CA
**⏱️Call Time:** estimated 8:30AM – 7:00PM (will likely wrap earlier)
**💲Rate:** $250
**Client:** Twitch streamer

**Food provided**
**Non-Union**

**Wardrobe Requirements:**
Please bring your own:
* White button-up dress shirt
* Black slacks
* Black tie
* Black dress shoes

**Serious inquiries only.**

items.text:
Casting Call!
Non-Union, Unpaid

Looking for actress between the ages of 45-50.

Film Title: Wops In A Basement

Genre: Short Film, Dark Comedy

Longline: An Italian-Canadian family try to have a peaceful dinner in their basement while their house is under renovation which leads to a chaotic and bloody solution.

Character:

Patty DiLeo (Caucasian): Ages 45-50. Tony’s wife who is very judgmental and likes to run her mouth a lot. 

Shooting date: Saturday, March 7th 2026

Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada 

Actresses, send headshots, resumes and demo reels to wopsshortfilm@gmail.com if interested.

Food and drinks with be provided on set.

Thank you!

items.text:
Casting call!!!!
Hey everyone, I'm just about halfway done casting for my upcoming romance film "A Handful of Love and Demons to Hate" based on a novel just published! The roles listed below are what I'm still in need of, so a character you can portray just send it to the email provided and follow the instructions on the flyer. I can't wait to get started soon and I look forward to everyone's submission. This does take place in GA and filming will start sometime in April. I plan to be finished by mid July. This is non paid however you will receive credit so just letting everyone know. To offset not being able to pay those brining my production together, I will be hosting a wrap up event/party for the last day of filming, offering low price novel copies to the cast instead of regular price, and sending you early access of the finished movie product that way you can see it before it comes out. Also you might have to click on the pictures of the roles because they can look blurry/pixelated at first then they clear up

Feel free to listen/watch and share!

Love Leyton

items.text:
Wenn der Chef die Menschen sieht, nicht nur die Zahlen?! 

https://youtube.com/shorts/SdUKT1LTLsY 

Unternehmenskultur pur – Was Mitarbeiter wirklich motiviert 

Dieser Short ist ein Ausschnitt aus unserer Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße Interviewreihe mit meiner Frau Sandra Wötzel vor der Kamera. 

Employee Relations – Warum Beziehungen im Job alles verändern 

Im ersten Teil beantwortet Petra Krauß, Immobilienmaklerin aus Frankfurt am Main, die Kernfrage: Was liegt Dir an Deiner Arbeit wirklich am Herzen? Ihre Antwort ist überraschend klar. Es sind die Menschen, also Beziehungen, die sie seit Jahrzehnten pflegt. Das ist ein Blick auf Arbeit, der weit über Zahlen und Abschlüsse hinausgeht. 

Was liegt Dir am Herzen – Immobilien trifft Handwerk 

Im zweiten Teil richtet Sandra eine direkte Frage an einen Heizungsbaumonteur aus dem Team von Hans van Bebber. Er kommt in diesem 14 Sekunden Teaser zeitlich nicht mehr zum Antworten, aber genau dadurch bleibt eine offene Schleife stehen: Wie lange arbeitet er schon dort und was ist das Schöne an der Arbeit? 

Arbeitsmotivation im echten Leben – Hans van Bebber im Fokus 

Der Clip gehört zu einem Video, in dem verschiedene Mitarbeiter über ihre Erfahrungen bei Hans van Bebber sprechen. Im Mittelpunkt stehen Employee Relations und Unternehmenskultur, also die Frage, wie Zusammenarbeit im Alltag wirklich gelebt wird. Es wird deutlich, wie stark Arbeitsmotivation davon abhängt, ob Beziehungen respektvoll, stabil und langfristig sind. 

Was motiviert Dich im Job mehr, das Ergebnis oder das Miteinander? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#doku #reportage #interview #unternehmenskultur #employeerelations #arbeitsmotivation #mitarbeiter #beziehungen #zusammenarbeit #vertrauen #handwerk #heizung #monteur #immobilien #frankfurt #arbeit #beruf #karrideo #sandraWötzel #shorts
items.title: Wenn Beziehungen bei der Arbeit alles verändern #Erfolg #Karriere

Im Mittelpunkt stehen Employee Relations und Unternehmenskultur, also die Frage, wie Zusammenarbeit im Alltag wirklich gelebt wird. Es wird deutlich, wie stark Arbeitsmotivation davon abhängt, ob Beziehungen respektvoll, stabil und langfristig sind. 

Was motiviert Dich im Job mehr, das Ergebnis oder das Miteinander? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#doku #reportage #interview #unternehmenskultur #employeerelations #arbeitsmotivation #mitarbeiter #beziehungen #zusammenarbeit #vertrauen #handwerk #heizung #monteur #immobilien #frankfurt #arbeit #beruf #karrideo #sandraWötzel #shorts

items.text:
**Fremtidens pensionister er ikke, som de var engang.**
Vi søger en mandlig statist i alderen **60–75 år** til en reklamefilm, der hylder det aktive, nysgerrige og ungdommelige liv – også når håret er blevet gråt.

Kort fortalt skal vi producere en lille film for et af Nykredits subbrands – pensionsopsparingsproduktet **Lokal Pulje Invest**.

Konceptet hedder *“Vi bliver yngre og yngre, når vi bliver ældre”* og handler om, at fremtidens pensionister er gladere, sundere og mere ungdommelige end tidligere generationer. Derfor viser reklamefilmen cool, gråhårede personer i situationer, man normalt kun forbinder med unge.

**Torsdag d. 5/3**
Optagelserne foregår i Silkeborgområdet og består ligeledes af tre scener: en vinterbadescene, en bustur og en bålhygge-scene. Optagelserne varer fra kl. 11.00–19.00.

**Der gives et honorar på 2.000 kr. for dagen**.

Materialet skal bruges på sociale medier og website (3 års rettigheder).

Udfyld gerne nedenstående formular – vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.

items.text:
𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐌𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐃 - 𝐄𝐔𝐑𝐎𝐏𝐄 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔

Vi åbner nu for ansøgninger til en 5 dages privat mastermind for skuespillere som afholdes i Europa en dato imellem (April og Juli).

Ophold i eksklusiv bolig f.eks villa eller slot.
(Umiddelbart i sydens sol)
15 pladser i alt.

6 pladser er allerede reserveret til interne talenter og inviterede deltagere.
9 åbne ansøgningspladser tilbage.

Dette er en lukket Mastermind for skuespillere, der arbejder seriøst med deres karriere og ønsker at rykke sig professionelt.

Masterminden inkluderer eksempelvis.:

• Strategisk karriere-workshop og branchepositionering
• oplæg og networking med instruktører, producere og branchefolk
• Kommunikation og voice coaching
• Mental performance coaching
• ⁠diverse workshops (make up, dans eller andet) 
• Personlig feedback på dit materiale
• Hjælp til at lave aktuelle castings
• Professionelle headshots og brandingbilleder
• Produktion af en professionelt instrueret kortfilm - alle får replikroller og reel scenetid
• Behind-the-scenes content og materiale til SoMe
• Fuld forplejning under hele opholdet - privat chef
• Afslutningsarrangement
• Gave til alle deltagere
• ⁠og andre Surprises 

Der vil eksempelvis være besøg fra Sven-Ole Thorsen.

Formålet er ikke blot en inspirerende tur - men konkret materiale, netværk og strategisk retning, som kan styrke din position i branchen.

Prisramme: 18.000 - 25.000 kr.

Vi arbejder med ansøgning og personlig godkendelse.

Yderligere information fremsendes ved kvalificeret henvendelse.

Send en privat besked eller mail på: 
Mastermind@rubiorex.com

 med:

- Hvorfor ønsker du at deltage?
- Hvorfor skal vi invitere dig? 

Kun seriøse henvendelser ønskes! 

Mvh 
Matthias og Kenneth 
RubioRex.com

𝐵𝑖𝑙𝑙𝑒𝑑𝑒𝑡 𝑒𝑟 𝑏𝑙𝑜𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑜𝑝𝑚æ𝑟𝑘𝑠𝑜𝑚ℎ𝑒𝑑

🎬 CASTING – MŁODZIEŻ 16–20 LAT
Warszawa | Projekt fabularny

Do nowego projektu ekranowego poszukujemy młodzieży w wieku 16–20 lat.

Jeśli czujesz się swobodnie przed kamerą, masz energię i chcesz spróbować swoich sił w produkcji filmowej — to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W mailu prześlij:
• aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)
• wiek
• miejsce zamieszkania
• Nr telefonu 
• Link do wizytówki na YT

items.text:
What are some good agencies please
Edit too ad context it’s model agency. I want.

topComments.text: So ideally you need to be looking at agencies which are near to you so depending where you live perhaps Dona search and see if their are any local agencies near you for whatever your interested in ?

Think hard to advise without context... Are you an established performer or just starting out? Are you on Spotlight? If so do you have top drawer credits and you are looking for the top agencies or are you someone just looking for a reputable agency that will serve you well? Are you more screen or more theatre/MT? 
Or are you just looking for extra / supporting artist work at this stage?

items.title: What are some good agencies please

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Hello,

We are looking for a male scene partner for an actor's showreel scene, filmed on the 5th March in London. When apply, please tell us the name of the character you are applying for (preferably in the subject line).

Scene: Park Etiquette

Character: Demir

Playing age: 30-40

Synopsis: Sasha’s playful banter with Demir turns vulnerable when she awkwardly spirals into a funny, self-conscious rant about not knowing what to do with her hands in public. Demir meets her anxiety with warmth and humor

Filming date: 5th March

Location: London (exact location TBC)

Pay: £25 per hour all inclusive

Duration: 2 hours

HOW TO APPLY:

Please apply via e-mail to casting@filmdock.net with a link to any casting directory profile or a link to your showreel.

Also, please do NOT attach large files to the e-mail (photos and videos), only links, so we can forward it to our client for consideration.

CLOSING DATE: 24th February @ 4pm

Any question, please do not hesitate to ask / comment.

Have a nice day.

#castingcall #showreel #actingreel #actorslife

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
you heard it here just guys! classes are open AND you can get a 10% discount if you bring a friend!!! if you’ve ever wanted to get into acting this is your sign🤩 locations are in leeds and surrounding areas (selby, garforth, wetherby & more!). it doesn’t matter if you’re a complete beginner or have a ton of experience, these classes are for everyone, no matter who you are! 

get involved and take your first steps into the industry 🤭

sharedPost.text:
Classes are open and we are taking on new students right now. 

Email us with your location and bring a friend to save 10% each.

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für eine Barszene in Berlin-Charlottenburg suchen wir noch einige Darsteller:innen ab ca. 25 Jahren, die Lust haben mitzuspielen und die Szene lebendig zu machen.

📍 Ort: Berlin-Charlottenburg

items.text:
🎬 **Frage an Schauspieler und Komparsen**

Wir sind eine Castingagentur aus Bratislava und arbeiten an internationalen Werbe- und Filmprojekten. Gerne möchten wir den ungarischen Castingmarkt besser kennenlernen.

👉 Mit welchen ungarischen Castingagenturen arbeitet ihr am häufigsten zusammen?
👉 Welche Agenturen haltet ihr für die fairsten, aktivsten und professionellsten?

Uns interessieren sowohl professionelle Schauspieler als auch Amateure/Komparsen.

Vielen Dank im Voraus für jede Empfehlung – das wäre für uns eine große Hilfe!

Greetings, just introducing myself to the group. I'm a multi-hyphenate focusing mostly on writing at the moment. I just released this resource for actors. 

If you can use some extra ammunition to set you apart from the herd, there are a great range of monologues from comic to dramatic. I'll even send a starving actor a read-only link in exchange for feedback to support the cause. Just message me!😀

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎬
We are 5th year MA students from University of Asia and the Pacific, and we are inviting you to be part of our 15 Min Short Film!

Handa ka na bang maging bahagi ng isang kuwentong puno ng alaala at muling pagkikita? 🎥

🗓 Application Period: February 20–25�

📧 Send applications to: primaproductions8@gmail.com�

✉️ Subject line format: CHARACTER – YOUR NAME�Ex: ALBA – MARIA AQUINO

🎬 Final shooting dates: 3rd week of March

📌 Kindly check our pubmats for more details�

⚠️ NOTE: This short film is a student-led project, PURELY FOR ACADEMIC PURPOSES

 LOGLINE: 

After the passing of his separated wife, an estranged father reconnects with his daughter after nearly a decade. The two live in different worlds, the daughter works in corporate, making a name for herself in her industry while the father is near rock bottom. In a desperate attempt to feel closer to her, the father recreates meals that the late mother has made in the past. Each meal recalling a simpler time, with tastes and flavors the daughter had nearly forgotten, slowly reconnecting her to her childhood.

Prima Productions is looking for actors who can portray:

🎭 ARTURO (Father, late 40s)�• Height: 5’6–5’10�• Preferably moreno (open to all complexions)�• Can speak Tagalog (English is a plus)�• Musically gifted is a plus (singing or playing instruments such as guitar or piano)�

Character: A broken yet hopeful father trying to reconnect with his daughter through food, memories, and music.

🎭 ALBA (Daughter, mid-20s)�• Height: 5’3–5’6�• Preferably morena (open to all complexions)�• Can speak both Tagalog and English�

Character: A driven corporate professional carrying emotional distance from her past, slowly rediscovering warmth and nostalgia.

NOW CASTING YOUNG CHRISTIANS: A dating series of biblical proportions is now casting nationwide! 

Imagine a dreamy, unforgettable spring break trip where you could be blessed with a ring by spring break! 

Now auditioning single, hot, confident, churchgoing college students and recent grads!

If you’re ready for a spring break that could change everything, drop a  and submit at the link in our bio!

items.text:
Hello everyone! 😊

I'm looking for an elegant cabaret showgirl / dancer (SFW, non-topless only) for a small, respectful fan-made AI tribute video on YouTube (Instant Babe style with a burlesque magician).

Ideal look: casual sexy (tied shirt + denim shorts).  

Bonus if you're naturally blonde or enjoy wearing blonde wigs (but absolutely not required!).

Everything will be fully credited/tagged and I'm happy to offer a small tip for your time. The project is purely artistic and respectful.

If you're interested or know someone who might be, feel free to send me a private message!  

Thank you so much for your time and for the amazing vintage/showgirl energy in this group ✨

Matthieu

Everything will be fully credited/tagged and I'm happy to offer a small tip for your time. The project is purely artistic and respectful.

If you're interested or know someone who might be, feel free to send me a private message!  

Thank you so much for your time and for the amazing vintage/showgirl energy in this group ✨

Matthieu

items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

NOWY PROJEKT - SZUKAMY DUBLERA AKTORA na 50 dni zdjęciowych!!!
Stawka za każdy dzień 250 zł 

Wymagane wymiary (mogą być minimalnie większe)

wzrost 181cm 
Klatka 113 cm
Pas 98 cm
Szyja 40 cm
barki 42cm
Głowa obwód 59 cm 
But 44 
-BRODA 
- wiek 40- 55 lat

Dodatkowe umiejętności / cechy szczególne:
- prawo jazdy kat. B, komfort za kierownicą
- sprawność fizyczna
- umiejętność pływania 

terminy:

okres zdjęciowy: 15.04 - 05.08

przerwa w zdjęciach: 26.06 - 22.07

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać:

- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- dobrej jakości aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki (bez okularów, nakryć głowy, itp.)
- warto napisać kilka słów o sobie i dołączyć wizytówkę

sharedPost.text:
CASTING DO NOWEGO PROJEKTU AKTORSKIEGO!

Marzysz o wystąpieniu na scenie, ale do tej pory nie miałxś okazji?
To idealny moment, aby spróbować swoich sił! 
Szukamy osób pełnych zaangażowania, otwartych i chętnych do rozwoju, mieszkających w okolicach Trójmiasta. 
Z nami zdobędziesz nowe doświadczenia, poznasz świetnych ludzi i weźmiesz udział w wyjątkowym projekcie artystycznym, którego efektem będzie spektakl muzyczny. 

Kogo szukamy?
Osób, w wieku 16-25 lat, które mają doświadczenie aktorskie, wokalne lub taneczne. (Będzie to duży atut.)
Jeśli nie masz takiego doświadczenia, a czujesz pasję i chęć rozwoju, lub jesteś w innym wieku – również rozważymy Twoje zgłoszenie! 
Warto próbować ;))

Jak aplikować?
Zgłoszenie wyślij na adres przedostatniprzystanek@gmail.com do 1 stycznia włącznie. 
Mail powinien zawierać:
*  krótki opis Twojej osoby, 
* informację dlaczego chcesz dołączyć,
*  opis twoich dotychczasowych doświadczeń artystycznych (CV, możesz wysłać też selftape),
* aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki oraz portretowe,
* link do twojego facebooka/ messengera;))

Etapy castingu:
Wybrane osoby zaprosimy do drugiego etapu, który odbędzie się 11.01 w Gdańsku. Więcej informacji przyślemy w odpowiedzi na maila zgłoszeniowego (do 4 stycznia włącznie). 

Organizacja prób:
Spotkania projektowe będą odbywać się w czwartki, w godzinach 16-20, w Gdańsku.

Jeśli czujesz, że to może być coś dla Ciebie, nie czekaj! Daj nam znać i dołącz do wyjątkowego projektu, który może stać się początkiem Twojej scenicznej drogi. 

W razie jakichkolwiek pytań zapraszamy do kontaktu na naszych social mediach @przedostatniprzystanek lub na maila przedostatniprzystanek@gmail.com. 

Czekamy właśnie na ciebie!
Zespół Przedostatniego Przystanku.  

* projekt NON PROFIT
•
•
•
#przedostatniprzystanek #sztuka #teatr #castingcall #casting

items.text:
POTNIA THERON de HÉLIA CORREIA

27 FEVEREIRO A 7 MARÇO
Quarta a Sábado às 21h30

AUDITÓRIO MUNICIPAL DO
FÓRUM CULTURAL DO SEIXAL

info e reservas 932 195 570 | reservas.teatrodaterra@gmail.com

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal, Biblioteca Municipal e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/172158-potnia_theron_de_helia_correia-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um epíteto e um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um rasgo, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA 
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
assistência de encenação
BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO

encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO DA TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
I am looking for a student to join me on a YouTube project in London 🌆

The role involves approaching people in the street, asking a set of prepared questions on camera 🎤, and having short, natural conversations. It is light, fun, and engaging work, but you should feel confident speaking to strangers and comfortable on camera 🙂

You should be a native English speaker (or very close), cheerful, outgoing, and positive ✨

Filming sessions are usually 6 to 8 hours per day ⏰ and this will be an ongoing project.

I offer £13 per hour (ONO) 💷 plus paid lunch 🍔

If this sounds like something you would enjoy, please send me a DM with a short introduction about yourself 📩

items.text:
Casting call
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “WORK FRIENDS” (London)

We are casting for a dark comedy short film set in a corporate office environment.

Student production with festival submission plans.

📍 London (office interior)

🗓 2 shooting days – last weeks of March

🎥 Festival-focused short film

ROLES:

• C (F, 20s–early 30s) – Lead. Anxious, intelligent office worker. Strong subtle acting + physical comedy timing required.

• B (F, 20s–30s) – Work friend. Natural, warm, slightly awkward. Good comedic timing.

• D (M, 20s–30s) – Quiet office colleague. Deadpan presence.

• Boss (M, 40s–50s) – Corporate authority figure. Small but impactful role.

Unpaid student project.

Food provided. London travel expenses covered.

Film intended for festival circuit and showreels.

📩 Please send headshots + showreel (if available) to casting.annet@gmail.com

topComments.text:
Interested :) 

Is this a weekend shoot ?
What film school are you at? Why aren’t you paying?

This is a unpaid non union short film, filmed in the areas of Mattlock Bath. We will pay for transportation as well as provide food & drink.

If interested please email me with a headshot and location.

Jonathanabailey1@outlook.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID MUSIC VIDEO (LONDON)**

Male actor required for a paid, one-day apocalyptic-themed music video shoot in central London this spring.

Reference photo from Terminator 2. The scene before LA is nuked. This short film will be set in an empty post-apocalyptic London city (without the nukes).

• One-character shoot
• Non-speaking role
• Playing age: 20–28
• Must be confident on rollerblades or roller skates
• Ideally 5'8" or taller

To apply, please DM:
1. One headshot
2. A video showreel. Please note, submissions without a showreel will not be considered.

Shortlisting will take place over the next month. All applicants will be contacted once the shortlist is finalised. Thanks.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of frisbee and grass

I could be good for this.

Ulønnet - SVENDEPRØVE / Medieskolerne Viborg. 🎬
5 x Statister (30-80 år - Både mænd og kvinder) 

Til vores svende produktion på FTP Uddannelsen i viborg søger jeg 5 statister til en lille scene i et venteværelse i Viborg - Søndag d. 1/3 2026 fra kl. 10.30-12.00 🎥 

Er der nogen der bor i eller omkring Viborg, der kunne være interesseret i af hjælpe os med filmen og få vores bevis? Så send gerne en besked på 53 60 71 59 ASAP! :) 🙏🏻 På forhånd tak!

items.text:
Looking for a freelance videographer (not an agency) in Los Angeles who understands Facebook/Instagram ad creatives with strong hooks.

This is for a dog training business. Highly trained dogs, outdoor filming, action-based content. I need someone who knows how to structure videos for attention and conversions — not cinematic promo or wedding style.

What I’m looking for:
• Short-form vertical video (Reels / FB ads / TikTok)
• Experience with paid social or direct-response content
• Able to help with hooks / concepts
• Freelancer only (no agencies or production companies)
• LA based

Please comment or DM with:
 1. Examples of ad creatives you’ve made
 2. Your rate (half day / full day)
 3. Availability

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

items.text:
I am looking for a student to join me on a YouTube project in London 🌆

The role involves approaching people in the street, asking a set of prepared questions on camera 🎤, and having short, natural conversations. It is light, fun, and engaging work, but you should feel confident speaking to strangers and comfortable on camera 🙂

You should be a native English speaker (or very close), cheerful, outgoing, and positive ✨

Filming sessions are usually 6 to 8 hours per day ⏰ and this will be an ongoing project.

I offer £13 per hour (ONO) 💷 plus paid lunch 🍔

If this sounds like something you would enjoy, please send me a DM with a short introduction about yourself 📩

**NATURAL LIGHT HEADSHOTS | NO SESSION FEE | CENTRAL LONDON - LIMITED AVAILABILITY (NEXT 2 WEEKS)**

*Casting-friendly, natural light headshots that actually look like you — cinematic, authentic, and submission-ready*
* Shot by an agency-endorsed photographer with years of experience working with actors, dancers and models, who will provide support and direction to bring out your best.
* No session fee — only invest in the editing (£30/edit*) of what you want to use - weekday morning sessions on location central London.

*Interested - DM here or linked insta below (more work can be seen):*

Headshots - https://www.instagram.com/kensington_portraits/
Fashion - https://www.instagram.com/the_taikan/

*Selection made via contact sheet within a week

We’re looking for men aged 22–30 to collaborate on an upcoming website portfolio shoot in Stellenbosch.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain professional content, and collaborate with a creative team in a clean, editorial setting.

Female presenter needed 🎥

items.text:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Shaun Daly and I currently in early development of producing a brand-new TV show titled ‘LOCAL TALENT’. Written and to be directed the talented Bethany McGiveron. The show is set in a town in the North West of England, where in a working-class neighbourhood, a brothel disguised as a “sauna” to the public resides. Within this brothel, we follow the group of women who own, manage and work there. All of whom are an array of characters who get along like a chosen family that will do whatever they can for each other. Helping one another to survive in this modern world that they are all struggling to survive in and catch moments of joy that life is meant to bring to them. 

The show is inspired a little by the Channel 4 documentary A Very British Brothel, along with stories and accounts of people who have worked in the industry. Stories and accounts we are still researching into now. The vibe and tone of the show is a drama/comedy like the likes of the UK Shameless and Brassic to name some examples. It is a show about together, positivity, banter amongst what the characters would consider are their chosen family. However, along with that, each character has their own personal conflicts, struggles, secrets and desperation for survival.

Our plan is to create a pitch package for the series, by producing the pilot episode. Looking to be around 45 to an hour maximum. We are currently in pre-production and are looking to film around the North West, anywhere from Wirral, Liverpool, St Helens and further if necessary.

What we are looking for is talented actors and actresses from around the North West who would be interested in playing the roles below. Warning that the show will explore themes of a sexual nature along with themes of survival and togetherness. Characters will be dressing up in sexy attire for clients and be performing suggestive positions, simulated sexual content and light fetish comedy as well. No intention of nudity to be involved.

If you’re comfortable with this, then please see the roles below and email shaundaly2510@gmail.com:

**CHELSEA**

Female, 30s,

Curvy, expressive, intimidating and hilarious. A dominatrix with sharp wit and a soft interior she hides well. Natural scouser who has moved away from her past in Liverpool and has found a home working as the Dominatrix of the brothel. Confident, funny, a strong presence within the Brothel.

**LYDIA**

Female, 30s – 40s.

Main villain of Series 1. Sharp, polished, cold underneath. Controlling, emotionally volatile. Very manipulative. Knows her beauty can seduce and make slaves of those who fall under her spell. Character will be exploring themes of domestic violence.

**SHIRLEY**

Female, late 30s – early 40s.

Body Positive, full figured, curvy, tom boyish character. Short practical hair. Dry humour and fiercely loyal. Childhood best friend of Tammy.

**TAMMY**

Female, late 30s – early 40s.

Body Positive, full figured, voluptuous, bubbly, girly, cheerful. Loyal, excitable, forms a comedic duo with Shirley. Warm and expressive. Can be nervous and frantic.

**BIG LIZ**

Trans masculine or non-binary performer, 40s – 50s.

Large frame, camp, emotional, theatrical. Switching between dramatic monologues and silly vulnerability. Use of masculine & feminine voice. Strong, comedic, like the mother hen of the group. With only the Manger Julie above them. Seen as second in command and protector of everyone who works for the Brothel.

**MARY** (Receptionist)

Female, 20s - 30s.

Receptionist of the Brothel. Organises all the clients, answers phones, sorts the lunches and evening meals, arranges the rotas for everyone working at the Brothel. She is small, gentle-looking, quietly stressed. The admin backbone of the brothel in the neat office that is seen when you walk in.

**ROSALINE**

Female, 30s.

Slim or average build, messy glamour, clearly exhausted. A touring girl whose unravelling emotional state becomes part of the plot. Mainly featured in the Pilot, may be planned to return for later episodes.

**BLOSSOM**

Female, Dark Skin Toned, late 30s–40s.

A Nigerian woman who works for the Brothel. She is elegant, expressive, deeply emotional. Balances trauma, fear, and warmth. She has come from a tough background and has come to the UK for a better life. For her, working at the Brothel is that better life, compared to the life she had back in Nigeria. She is kind and considerate, but still afraid to stand up for herself. Especially when it comes to her stalker Ade.

**ADE**

Male, dark skin tone, 40s - 50s.

Tall, intimidating, deeply unsettling. Stalker presence, threatening. Strong physical presence. Very smug and cocky. To the point of unbearable. 

**DARREN** (Blossom love interest)

Male, 30s–40s.

Short man, sweet, warm, confident but sensitive. Blossoms love interest and the opposite of Ade. Darren is in love with Blossom and is happy just to spend time with her and even wants to embrace her culture and be a part of her life. He is looked down upon and seen as too soft, especially from Ade. But there is more to Darren than meets the eye.

**NIGEL**

Male, late 30s–50s.

Soft, friendly, policeman. Awkward. Very innocent and naïve. Stuff that goes on in the brothel could be seen to make him feel uncomfortable. Good hearted individual.

**STEVE (Office Pennington, Policeman)**

Male, late 20s–30s.

Stiff, easily flustered police officer. Easily manipulated. Tries to act all hard and tough when he is just a pawn for a bigger scheme to be revealed later in the series. Entangled with Lydia.

topComments.text: This sounds brilliant. I’ll be sending an email in!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – Athletic Male (30s)**
Paid Video Shoot – Non-union

We are casting a confident, fit male in his 30s for a short-form video shoot promoting a carbon fiber insole.

**What We’re Looking For:**
• Male, 30s
• Lean, athletic build with strong muscle tone
• Comfortable speaking on camera

**Concept:**
The video will be filmed outdoors, waist-up framing. You will be answering a total of 15 questions that appears on screen in an Instagram-style format. The delivery should feel confident, relaxed, and natural — not salesy or stiff.

**Sample Question (Audition Required – Question #3):**
“Can you use them in everyday shoes?” 

**Audition Requirement:**
To apply, please submit a short self-tape of you answering the question above using the provided script in the photo attached. This helps us ensure you’re a strong fit for the tone and delivery style we’re looking for. Please wear a tank top or tight t-shirt so we can see your muscle tone. 

**Location:** TBD
**Shoot Date:** Within the next 2 weeks, weather dependent

**Pay:**
$75 per hour
Minimum 4-hour guarantee

We expect filming to take approximately 2–3 hours. Total time will depend largely on line delivery efficiency, as the camera setup will remain fixed once established.

If interested, please send:
• Headshot or recent photos
• Short audition video answering Question #3
• Your availability within the next 2 weeks

Email - ecomfilmworks@gmail.com 
Subject Line - Insoles Casting 

Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Video Question 3 "Can you use them in everyday shoes?" Answer: I use these both for workouts and my daily shoes. They' re low- low-profile, so they don' t change the shape of the shoe. They work especially well with classic or narrow shoes. You stay stylish, but your feet are supported all day long. That' honestly one of the biggest advantages.'

items.text:
LIFE IN RECORD CASTING CALL
Produced by Hidden Valley Entertainment & Black Spark Productions

Written by Jacob Ellis

Directed by Jacob Ellis

Please Send Headshots, Reel, and Resume to Lifeinrecordfilm@gmail.com

Due Date: Friday, February 27th, 8:00PM

Shoot length: 5 days from April 28th - May 3rd

Film Location: Kelowna, BC

Script length: 14 pages

Travel, Accommodations, and Food will be covered

Pay: IMDB credit, Reel footage, Deferred pay as well as residuals. Rate can be negotiated. 

Synopsis: Arthur Erikson led a tumultuous life, and an even more challenging after life. After `arriving in purgatory, Arthur meets Angel, his case manager. Who leads him on a journey to reflect upon actions he took in his life by listening to cassette recordings of his life. Their relationship shifts between arguing to comradery. Leading Arthur to make the decision whether to damn himself to heaven or to hell.

Trigger warnings: Discusses SA, no nudity required nor will it be shown, simply talked about.

Arthur Erikson: Male, Mid 20s - Early 30s. Thinks highly of himself, working in pharmaceutical sales. Wreathed in toxic masculinity, throughout the short his shields break down revealing a more sensitive person. Dressed in business casual, Put together. Will require a scruffy beard and shaving throughout the shoot.

Please Send Headshots, Reel, and Resume to Lifeinrecordfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Żołnierz Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

**Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Morskie opowieści’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 50** lat o wzroście 170  cm, pas 85/90 i **obwód klatki do 90/95cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest już zrobiony na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. W lipcu i sierpniu tego  roku szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku.

 

     **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of overcoat

items.summary:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Żołnierz Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

**Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Morskie opowieści’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 50** lat o wzroście 170  cm, pas 85/90 i **obwód klatki do 90/95cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest już zrobiony na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. W lipcu i sierpniu tego  roku szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku.

 

     **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
CASTING CALL – COMMUNITY NOTICE

We’re student filmmakers casting our final short film, Community Notice  set during a community meeting about a missing cat, and the tensions that quietly surface in the room.

We’re looking for strong, naturalistic performers across a range of roles. 

📍 Filming in Belfast
💰 Paid 

As this is an independent student production, we’re also currently fundraising to support the film’s production costs. If you’d like to support the project.

https://gofund.me/f58297f42

To apply, send your headshot, showreel (if available), and a short introduction to:
📩 communitynoticeshortfilm@gmail.com

Selected applicants will receive self - tape materials 

Thanks 
Lucy Young 
(Writer & Director)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call CHAIRPERSON Any gender Playing age 20-45 Procedural. Measured. Clinging to order. Knows this meeting isn't about cat - - and doesn't want it t to go there. A restrained, controlled performance. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfim@gmail.com short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Declan Male| Playinga age 18-25 Restless. Slightly defensive. Detached on the surface. Carries more awareness than he lets show. Looking for subtle internal tension rather than overt attitude. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call PATRICK Male Playing age 55-70 Blunt. Defensive. Certain he's being practical. Represents a generation that mistakes emotional distance for strength. This role requires subtlety not villain. • How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and a short introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotilm@gmail.com Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call NIAMH Female Playing age 25-35 Earnest. Polite. Conflict-averse. Wants harmony at any cost even it means avoiding the truth. Needs naturalistic delivery and quiet comedic timing. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.c short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call ROSE Female|Playing.age45-60 Playing age Quiet. Watchful. Says very little. Feels like she knows more than she lets on. A presence role. Strong screen stillness essential. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfilm@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

items.text:
HD STUNT
🔥 EVENT ORGANIZERS / BOOKERS 🔥

Looking for something DIFFERENT for your next event?

We are **HD STUNT** — professional Harley-Davidson stunt riders.

Yes… stunt riding on real Harleys.
Not sport bikes. Not standard freestyle.

💥 High-impact stunt shows
💥 Multiple riders available
💥 Wheelie Simulator (interactive crowd attraction)
💥 Perfect for festivals, bike shows, dealerships, city events & brand activations

15+ years of experience
International shows
Professional & insured team

If you want your event to stand out — let’s talk.

📩 DM me for booking details
🌐

items.text:
Du willst spielen – weißt aber nicht, wo du anfangen sollst? 🎭

Viele träumen vom Schauspiel. Wenige wissen, wie der erste Schritt wirklich aussieht.

In unserem 6-wöchigen virtuellen Schauspielkurs lernst du die Grundlagen, die wirklich zählen:
• Rollen verstehen
• Texte lebendig machen
• authentisch im Moment bleiben
• sicher vor der Kamera oder im digitalen Raum auftreten

- Live via Zoom.
- Mit fester Gruppe.
- Mit klarer Struktur.
- Ohne Leistungsdruck – aber mit Anspruch.

Egal, ob du neu startest oder nach einer Pause wieder einsteigen möchtest – hier bekommst du einen professionellen Rahmen für deinen Einstieg.

📅 Start: 22. April 2026
👥 Max. 10 Plätze
💡 Frühbucher-Vorteil bis 01. März

Alle Infos findest du hier: [https://schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/schauspielkurs/](https://schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/schauspielkurs/)

Wir freuen uns auf dich.

items.title: Du willst spielen – weißt aber nicht, wo du anfangen sollst? 🎭

items.text:
Du willst als Schauspieler:in ernst genommen werden? Aber du hast keine Ausbildung?
Eine Schauspielschule in Vollzeit kommt für dich gerade nicht infrage.

Job. Miete. Alltag. Realität.

Vielleicht kennst du diese Gedanken:

„Ohne Ausbildung nimmt mich sowieso niemand ernst.“

„Ich bin Quereinsteiger:in, ich habe ja nichts vorzuweisen.“

„Für eine richtige Schauspielschule ist es jetzt zu spät.“

Gerade hier im Raum Köln gibt es viele Talente, die genau daran scheitern, nicht am Können. 

Die Wahrheit ist:

Was dich ernstzunehmend macht, ist nicht der Titel auf dem Papier sondern saubere Grundlagen, Technik, Präsenz und professionelle Vorbereitung.

Und genau deshalb haben wir eine berufsbegleitende Schauspielausbildung in Abendform aufgebaut. Speziell für Menschen, die arbeiten, aber ihren Traum nicht aufgeben wollen.

Mich würde interessieren:

Wer hier aus Köln oder Umgebung träumt davon im Bereich Schauspiel zu arbeiten hat aber keine klassische Ausbildung?

Ich erkläre dir gern, wie du professionell starten kannst, ohne deinen Job aufzugeben.

Schreib **„Acting“** in die Kommentare oder schreib mir eine Nachricht.

🌺✨ MODEL CASTING, RUNWAY & Free Eco Lux Organic Body Air brush WORKSHOP ✨🌺

Are you ready to step into your power and walk the global stage?

This is your opportunity to train, elevate, and prepare for the 2026 World Fashion Expo Hawai‘i at the Marriott Waikīkī Resort & Spa on March 15, 2026.

We are calling serious, disciplined, and committed models who are ready to grow, learn, and represent on an international level, for the past 33 years, every season we showcase twice a year in  New York to London, Milan, Paris, Berlin, Los Angeles, Miami, and Hawai‘i.

🔥 This is more than a casting this is elite runway preparation.

🔴 DATES & TIMES

Casting & Model Workshop
🚨 February 22, 2026
2:00pm-5:00pm
5:00pm-7:00pm

🟡 Casting & Model Workshop
March 7, 2026 | 5:00–7:00 PM

🟡 March 8, 2026
Free Eco Lux Organic Professional Body Airbrush Workshop

🟡 Fittings
March 13 & 14 | 3:30–8:00 PM

📍 Location: Ola Ka‘ilima ARTSPACE, Loft Room 332📞 CALL ONLY: (808) 726-4614

Come prepared. Come focused. Come ready to work.

🌟 Train with purpose.🌟 Walk with power.🌟 Own the runway.

#ModelCastingCall #RunwayWorkshop #InternationalRunway #FashionWeekPrep #GlobalFashion #ParadiseIslandFashionWeek

✨ TWARZE – a Casting Agency with Experience ✨
For 12 years we have been supporting commercial, film, and TV productions.
Our database includes over 25,000 models, actors, and extras ready to join your project.

📸 Looking for faces for a photo shoot?
🎬 Actors for a movie or commercial campaign?

Our penultimate Panto Performance of `The Elves & The Shoe Maker' was performed at the beautiful Criterion Theatre on Saturday in Blue Town on the Isle of Sheppey. 

WE loved our second time at this theatre the Criterion Blue Town is a theatre, cinema, music hall and museum and is truly a hidden gem by the seaside!  

We only have 1 performance left now of this wonderfully funny family Panto on :- 

**Sat 28th Feb at 3pm at St. Barnabas Church, **Istead Rise -

If you haven't seen it this is your last chance - Call:- Pauline 07729596567.
